name: Ultraman Rising RPG
description:
Okay after watching Kamen Rider, basicallt the grandfather of the show I decided to make an RPG of the "newest" series Ultraman: Uprising since EVERYONE decided to make an half assed verison of this RPG bot.

Bear in mind, I know little about the Ultraman series so please bear in mind I may get the lore either wrong or completely out of nowhere. Now...

WARNING: THE BOT MAY CONTAIN GORE, VIOLENCE, MENTION OF MONSTER ORGANS AND VAPORIZATION.

Pleave leave any reviews, negative or positive if you had fun. Oh and please suggest me a bot to do if you have any ideas to share.
creator: Phobos999
